name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Van Nuys, CA payday loan and title loan services at ACE Cash Express on Sherman Way.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is located at 14526 Sherman Way in Van Nuys, CA, offering quick cash solutions in this busy Sherman Oaks/Van Nuys area. The branch is open Monday through Thursday from 8AM to 7PM, Friday 8AM to 8PM, and Saturday 9AM to 5PM (closed Sundays), making it convenient for Van Nuys residents to access services during extended weekday and weekend hours.

At this Van Nuys location, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, check cashing, and other financial services. For specific questions or to start an application, call the branch directly at (818) 787-8136. The staff can discuss loan options, requirements, and next steps.

If you need fast cash in Van Nuys, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information—most applications are processed same-day. This Sherman Way branch serves the Van Nuys community with flexible lending options designed for short-term financial needs.
pros: Multiple service offerings beyond emergency loans: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Physical store locations across multiple states for in-person service
Online loan options available for remote customers
Same-day or rapid funding for emergency cash needs
Customer service available through multiple contact channels (phone and email)
Established company with long operational history in the alternative finance space
Accommodates consumers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans
cons: Website contains broken pages and 404 errors for specific locations, suggesting poor digital maintenance or inactive stores
Product availability is highly state-dependent with unclear terms-of-service restrictions
No transparent pricing, APR, or fee information visible on provided website content
Loan amounts and terms not clearly stated in accessible website content
Physical store dependency may limit accessibility for consumers without nearby locations
best_for: Consumers needing same-day or next-day emergency cash with no bank account
Vehicle owners seeking title-based loans against collateral
Unbanked or underbanked individuals requiring check cashing and money transfer services
People in states where ACE maintains active store locations
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers needing rapid emergency cash and those in areas with physical store access, but the broken website and state-dependent availability make it difficult to verify current service offerings and pricing. The main caveat is that specific loan amounts, APRs, fees, and product availability should be verified directly through customer service or in-person store visits, as the website does not provide transparent terms.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 14526 Sherman Way, Van Nuys, CA. Fast payday & title loans same-day.
